con:part.con:content: <!--Published by JAX-WS RI at http://jax-ws.dev.java.net. targetNamespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/" name="servico-intercomunicacao-2G-2.2.2" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:wsp1_2="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/ws/2004/09/policy" schemaLocation="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222?xsd=1"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/" schemaLocation="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222?xsd=2"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/mni/cda" schemaLocation="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222?xsd=3"/> </xsd:schema> <xsd:schema> <xsd:import namespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/intercomunicacao-2.2.2" schemaLocation="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222?xsd=4"/> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="confirmarRecebimento"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:confirmarRecebimento"/> </message> <message name="confirmarRecebimentoResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:confirmarRecebimentoResposta"/> </message> <message name="consultarTeorComunicacao"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarTeorComunicacao"/> </message> <message name="consultarTeorComunicacaoResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarTeorComunicacaoResposta"/> </message> <message name="consultarAvisosPendentes"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarAvisosPendentes"/> </message> <message name="consultarAvisosPendentesResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarAvisosPendentesResposta"/> </message> <message name="consultarProcesso"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarProcesso"/> </message> <message name="consultarProcessoResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarProcessoResposta"/> </message> <message name="entregarManifestacaoProcessual"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:entregarManifestacaoProcessual"/> </message> <message name="entregarManifestacaoProcessualResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:entregarManifestacaoProcessualResposta"/> </message> <message name="consultarAlteracao"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarAlteracao"/> </message> <message name="consultarAlteracaoResponse"> <part name="parameters" element="tns:consultarAlteracaoResposta"/> </message> <portType name="servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2"> <operation name="confirmarRecebimento"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/confirmarRecebimento" message="tns:confirmarRecebimento"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/confirmarRecebimentoResponse" message="tns:confirmarRecebimentoResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="consultarTeorComunicacao"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarTeorComunicacao" message="tns:consultarTeorComunicacao"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarTeorComunicacaoResponse" message="tns:consultarTeorComunicacaoResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="consultarAvisosPendentes"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAvisosPendentes" message="tns:consultarAvisosPendentes"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAvisosPendentesResponse" message="tns:consultarAvisosPendentesResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="consultarProcesso"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarProcesso" message="tns:consultarProcesso"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarProcessoResponse" message="tns:consultarProcessoResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="entregarManifestacaoProcessual"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/entregarManifestacaoProcessual" message="tns:entregarManifestacaoProcessual"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/entregarManifestacaoProcessualResponse" message="tns:entregarManifestacaoProcessualResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="consultarAlteracao"> <input wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAlteracao" message="tns:consultarAlteracao"/> <output wsam:Action="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAlteracaoResponse" message="tns:consultarAlteracaoResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="servico-intercomunicacao-2G-2.2.2SOAPBinding" type="tns:servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <operation name="confirmarRecebimento"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/confirmarRecebimento"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="consultarAvisosPendentes"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAvisosPendentes"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> soapAction="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/entregarManifestacaoProcessual"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="consultarAlteracao"> <soap:operation soapAction="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/consultarAlteracao"/> <input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <service name="servico-intercomunicacao-2G-2.2.2"> <port name="servico-intercomunicacao-2G-2.2.2SOAP" binding="tns:servico-intercomunicacao-2G-2.2.2SOAPBinding"> <soap:address location="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222"/> </port> </service> </definitions>

<!--Published by JAX-WS RI at http://jax-ws.dev.java.net. RI's version is Metro/2.2.0-1 (tags/2.2.0u1-7139; 2012-06-02T10:55:19+0000) JAXWS-RI/2.2.6-2 JAXWS/2.2 svn-revision#unknown.--> <xs:schema version="1.0" targetNamespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/tipos-servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2" xmlns:ns1="http://www.cnj.jus.br/intercomunicacao-2.2.2" xmlns:xmime="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" schemaLocation="https://projudi.tjpr.jus.br:443/projudi/webservices/projudiIntercomunicacaoWebService2G222?xsd=4"/> <xs:import namespace="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" schemaLocation="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime"/> <xs:complexType name="tipoEntregarManifestacaoProcessualResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="protocoloRecebimento" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="dataOperacao" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="recibo" xmime:expectedContentTypes="application/octet-stream" type="xs:base64Binary" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="parametro" type="ns1:tipoParametro" form="qualified" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoEntregarManifestacaoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idManifestante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="senhaManifestante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="dadosBasicos" type="ns1:tipoCabecalhoProcesso" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="ns1:tipoDocumento" form="qualified" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="dataEnvio" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="parametros" type="ns1:tipoParametro" form="qualified" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarTeorComunicacaoResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="comunicacao" type="ns1:tipoComunicacaoProcessual" form="qualified" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarAvisosPendentes"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idRepresentado" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="idConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="senhaConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="dataReferencia" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarAvisosPendentesResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="aviso" type="ns1:tipoAvisoComunicacaoPendente" form="qualified" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarAlteracaoResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="hashCabecalho" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="hashMovimentacoes" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="hashDocumentos" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarAlteracao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="senhaConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarProcesso"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="senhaConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="dataReferencia" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="movimentos" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="incluirCabecalho" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="incluirDocumentos" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="xs:string" form="qualified" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarTeorComunicacao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="senhaConsultante" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="identificadorAviso" type="xs:string" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConfirmarRecebimentoResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConsultarProcessoResposta"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="sucesso" type="xs:boolean" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="mensagem" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="processo" type="ns1:tipoProcessoJudicial" form="qualified" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoConfirmarRecebimento"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idRecebedor" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="senhaRecebedor" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> <xs:element name="protocolo" type="xs:string" form="qualified"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<!--Published by JAX-WS RI at http://jax-ws.dev.java.net. RI's version is Metro/2.2.0-1 (tags/2.2.0u1-7139; 2012-06-02T10:55:19+0000) JAXWS-RI/2.2.6-2 JAXWS/2.2 svn-revision#unknown.--> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" version="1.0" targetNamespace="http://www.cnj.jus.br/intercomunicacao-2.2.2" xmlns:tns="http://www.cnj.jus.br/intercomunicacao-2.2.2" xmlns:xmime="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:import namespace="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" schemaLocation="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime"/> <xs:element name="intercomunicacao" type="tns:tipoIntercomunicacao"/> <xs:complexType name="tipoParte"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pessoa" type="tns:tipoPessoa" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="interessePublico" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="advogado" type="tns:tipoRepresentanteProcessual" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="pessoaProcessualRelacionada" type="tns:tipoParte" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="assistenciaJudiciaria" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:attribute name="intimacaoPendente" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="relacionamentoProcessual" type="tns:modalidadeRelacionamentoProcessual"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoPessoa"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="outroNome" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="tns:tipoDocumentoIdentificacao" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="endereco" type="tns:tipoEndereco" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="pessoaRelacionada" type="tns:tipoRelacionamentoPessoal" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="pessoaVinculada" type="tns:tipoPessoa" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="nome" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="sexo" type="tns:modalidadeGeneroPessoa" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="nomeGenitor" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="nomeGenitora" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="dataNascimento" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="dataObito" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="numeroDocumentoPrincipal" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoPessoa" type="tns:tipoQualificacaoPessoa" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="cidadeNatural" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="estadoNatural" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="nacionalidade" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumentoIdentificacao"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="codigoDocumento" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="emissorDocumento" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoDocumento" type="tns:modalidadeDocumentoIdentificador" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="nome" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoEndereco"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="logradouro" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="numero" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="complemento" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="bairro" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="cidade" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="codCidade" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="estado" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="pais" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="cep" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoRelacionamentoPessoal"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="pessoa" type="tns:tipoPessoa"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="modalidadeRelacionamento" type="tns:modalidadesRelacionamentoPessoal"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoRepresentanteProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="endereco" type="tns:tipoEndereco" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="nome" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="inscricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="numeroDocumentoPrincipal" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="intimacao" type="xs:boolean" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoRepresentante" type="tns:modalidadeRepresentanteProcessual" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoProcessoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="dadosBasicos" type="tns:tipoCabecalhoProcesso"/> <xs:element name="movimento" type="tns:tipoMovimentoProcessual" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="tns:tipoDocumento" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoCabecalhoProcesso"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="polo" type="tns:tipoPoloProcessual" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="assunto" type="tns:tipoAssuntoProcessual" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="magistradoAtuante" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="processoVinculado" type="tns:tipoVinculacaoProcessual" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="siglaTribunal" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="grau" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="prioridade" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="outroParametro" type="tns:tipoParametro" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="valorCausa" type="xs:double" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:tipoOrgaoJulgador"/> <xs:element name="outrosnumeros" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="numero" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="competencia" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="classeProcessual" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="codigoLocalidade" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="nivelSigilo" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="intervencaoMP" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:attribute name="tamanhoProcesso" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="dataAjuizamento" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="procEl" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="dscSistema" type="xs:int"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoPoloProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="parte" type="tns:tipoParte" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="polo" type="tns:modalidadePoloProcessual"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAssuntoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="codigoNacional" type="xs:int" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="assuntoLocal" type="tns:tipoAssuntoLocal" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="principal" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAssuntoLocal"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="assuntoLocalPai" type="tns:tipoAssuntoLocal" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="codigoAssunto" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="codigoPaiNacional" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="descricao" type="xs:string" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoVinculacaoProcessual"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="vinculo" type="tns:modalidadeVinculacaoProcesso" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoParametro"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="nome" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="valor" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoOrgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="codigoOrgao" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="nomeOrgao" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="instancia" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="codigoMunicipioIBGE" type="xs:int" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoMovimentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="complemento" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="movimentoNacional" type="tns:tipoMovimentoNacional" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="movimentoLocal" type="tns:tipoMovimentoLocal" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="complementoNacional" type="tns:tipoComplementoNacional" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="idDocumentoVinculado" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="dataHora" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="nivelSigilo" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="identificadorMovimento" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoMovimentoNacional"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="complemento" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="codigoNacional" type="xs:int" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoMovimentoLocal"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="movimentoLocalPai" type="tns:tipoMovimentoLocal" minOccurs="0"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="codigoMovimento" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="codigoPaiNacional" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="descricao" type="xs:string" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoComplementoNacional"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="codComplemento" type="xs:int" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="descricaoComplemento" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="codComplementoTabelado" type="xs:int" use="required"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumento"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="conteudo" xmime:expectedContentTypes="application/octet-stream" type="xs:base64Binary" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="assinatura" type="tns:tipoAssinatura" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="outroParametro" type="tns:tipoParametro" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:any processContents="lax" namespace="##other"/> <xs:element name="documentoVinculado" type="tns:tipoDocumento" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="idDocumento" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="idDocumentoVinculado" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoDocumento" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="dataHora" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="mimetype" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="nivelSigilo" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="movimento" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="hash" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoDocumentoLocal" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAssinatura"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="signatarioLogin" type="tns:tipoSignatarioSimples" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="assinatura" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="dataAssinatura" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="cadeiaCertificado" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="algoritmoHash" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="codificacaoCertificado" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoSignatarioSimples"> <xs:sequence/> <xs:attribute name="identificador" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="dataHora" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoIntercomunicacao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="processojudicial" type="tns:tipoProcessoJudicial" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="avisocomunicacao" type="tns:tipoAvisoComunicacaoPendente" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="comunicacaoprocessual" type="tns:tipoComunicacaoProcessual" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="tns:tipoDocumento" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAvisoComunicacaoPendente"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="destinatario" type="tns:tipoParte"/> <xs:element name="processo" type="tns:tipoCabecalhoProcesso"/> <xs:element name="dataDisponibilizacao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="idAviso" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoComunicacao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoComunicacaoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="destinatario" type="tns:tipoParte"/> <xs:element name="processo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="teor" type="xs:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xs:element name="documento" type="tns:tipoDocumento" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:element name="parametro" type="xs:string" nillable="true" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xs:any processContents="lax" namespace="##other"/> </xs:sequence> <xs:attribute name="id" type="xs:string" use="required"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoComunicacao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="tipoPrazo" type="tns:tipoPrazo"/> <xs:attribute name="dataReferencia" type="xs:string"/> <xs:attribute name="prazo" type="xs:int"/> <xs:attribute name="nivelSigilo" type="xs:int"/> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadeDocumentoIdentificador"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CI"/> <xs:enumeration value="CNH"/> <xs:enumeration value="TE"/> <xs:enumeration value="CN"/> <xs:enumeration value="CC"/> <xs:enumeration value="PAS"/> <xs:enumeration value="CT"/> <xs:enumeration value="RIC"/> <xs:enumeration value="CMF"/> <xs:enumeration value="PIS_PASEP"/> <xs:enumeration value="CEI"/> <xs:enumeration value="NIT"/> <xs:enumeration value="CP"/> <xs:enumeration value="IF"/> <xs:enumeration value="OAB"/> <xs:enumeration value="RJC"/> <xs:enumeration value="RGE"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadesRelacionamentoPessoal"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="P"/> <xs:enumeration value="AP"/> <xs:enumeration value="SP"/> <xs:enumeration value="T"/> <xs:enumeration value="C"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadeGeneroPessoa"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="M"/> <xs:enumeration value="F"/> <xs:enumeration value="D"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tipoQualificacaoPessoa"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="fisica"/> <xs:enumeration value="juridica"/> <xs:enumeration value="autoridade"/> <xs:enumeration value="orgaorepresentacao"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadeRepresentanteProcessual"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="A"/> <xs:enumeration value="E"/> <xs:enumeration value="M"/> <xs:enumeration value="D"/> <xs:enumeration value="P"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadeRelacionamentoProcessual"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CP"/> <xs:enumeration value="RP"/> <xs:enumeration value="TF"/> <xs:enumeration value="AT"/> <xs:enumeration value="AS"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadePoloProcessual"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="AT"/> <xs:enumeration value="PA"/> <xs:enumeration value="TC"/> <xs:enumeration value="FL"/> <xs:enumeration value="TJ"/> <xs:enumeration value="AD"/> <xs:enumeration value="VI"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="modalidadeVinculacaoProcesso"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="CX"/> <xs:enumeration value="CT"/> <xs:enumeration value="DP"/> <xs:enumeration value="AR"/> <xs:enumeration value="CD"/> <xs:enumeration value="OR"/> <xs:enumeration value="RR"/> <xs:enumeration value="RG"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="tipoPrazo"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="HOR"/> <xs:enumeration value="DIA"/> <xs:enumeration value="MES"/> <xs:enumeration value="ANO"/> <xs:enumeration value="DATA_CERTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="SEMPRAZO"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:schema>

<!--W3C XML Schema defined in the Describing Media Content of Binary Data in XML specification http://www.w3.org/TR/xml-media-types
Copyright © 2005 World Wide Web Consortium,

This work is distributed under the W3C® Software License [1] in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
[1] http://www.w3.org/Consortium/Legal/2002/copyright-software-20021231
$Id: xmlmime.xsd,v 1.1 2005/04/25 17:08:35 hugo Exp $--> <xs:schema targetNamespace="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xmime="http://www.w3.org/2005/05/xmlmime"> <xs:attribute name="contentType"> <xs:simpleType> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:minLength value="3"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> </xs:attribute> <xs:attribute name="expectedContentTypes" type="xs:string"/> <xs:complexType name="base64Binary"> <xs:simpleContent> <xs:extension base="xs:base64Binary"> <xs:attribute ref="xmime:contentType"/> </xs:extension> </xs:simpleContent> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="hexBinary"> <xs:simpleContent> <xs:extension base="xs:hexBinary"> <xs:attribute ref="xmime:contentType"/> </xs:extension> </xs:simpleContent> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:ser="http://www.cnj.jus.br/servico-intercomunicacao-2.2.2/" tamanhoProcesso="?" dataAjuizamento="?" procEl="?" dscSistema="?">\r <!--1 or more repetitions:-->\r <int:polo polo="?">\r <!--1 or more repetitions:-->\r <int:parte assistenciaJudiciaria="?" codigoDocumento="?" emissorDocumento="?" tipoDocumento="?" nome="?"/>\r <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->\r <int:endereco cep="?">\r <!--Optional:-->\r <int:logradouro>?</int:logradouro>\r
